personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for creating and managing AI-generated, genre-specific news briefings. Marks the first user's conv_id as the source for the 2-hour news cycle. Fetches top headlines for 7 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather. Retrieves teacher avatar IDs via the Hevolve API and assigns one to each genre. Generates realistic narration scripts per genre. Creates one AI video per genre with assigned avatars, checks their readiness status, stores videos, and marks conv_id as ready for reuse.

personas.name: User (Reactor)
personas.description: Viewer who consumes the latest AI-generated news videos. Accesses current 7-genre video set linked to the active source conv_id. Views videos in a seamless, looping format without triggering new video generation.

actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre and save: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather.
For each genre, fetch latest headlines using Google search query.
Generate short narration scripts in news anchor reading style and save scripts with timestamps (e.g., 'Here’s your quick update on [genre name]…').
Generate one realistic AI video per script using assigned avatar and save conv_id with status pending.
Check video generation status every 1 minute using API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} and update status to success on confirmation.
Store all 7 videos with metadata including genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
Schedule execution every 2 hours, track news stories till closure, and manage array with timestamps based on metadata.
flows.sub_goal: Create and manage AI-generated video news briefings for 7 genres every 2 hours

flows.flow_name: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful meta data records in Active 2-Hour Window
actions: Check and get list of conv_id with status marked as success by comparing current timestamp with new script timestamp.
If conv_id list not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to conv_id with assigned avatars.
Publish each realistic video sequentially using conv_id and save list of conv_id in metadata against played_news_user_id.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 7-genre video set for users within current 2-hour cycle based on expiry timestamp
